title: FIFA WC 2026 — Live Results & Stats
key_tables: matches(89×17), match_events(694×6), match_lineups(4576×7), match_team_stats(156×12), player_stats(1248×21), squads_and_players(1248×10), teams(48×8), venues(16×8)
key_columns: date, stage, venue, home/away_team_id, score, possession_pct, shots, shots_on_target, corners; player: market_value_eur, goals, assists, pass_accuracy
traps: event table only has 694 rows (incomplete events); lineups is source of truth for player appearances; squads_and_players has all 1248 players with market_value_eur

title: FIFA WC 2026 — Match Data (FBref-style)
key_columns: formation, possession, shots, shots_on_target, corners, fouls, cards, xG per team
traps: Match-level only; join to mominullptr on date+teams for player-level linkage

title: FIFA WC 2026 — Player Data (FBref-style)
key_columns: xG, xA, plus_minus, GK stats (save_pct, clean_sheets), progressive carries/passes, fouls, discipline
traps: Tournament cumulative totals only; no match-level breakdown

title: FIFA WC 2026 — Team Data (FBref-style)
key_columns: goals, assists, xG, GK stats (save_pct, clean_sheets_pct), pressing (fouls, tackles_won, interceptions), pens_won/conceded, plus_minus; all mirrored for opponent side
traps: 48 rows only; team-level aggregates; NEW in round 2 — missed in prior catalog

title: FIFA WC 2026 — WhoScored Event Data (xT+VAEP)
key_columns: xT, VAEP, event_type, player_id, minute, x/y coordinates
time_span: 2026 group stage only (~20 matches as of Jun 29)
traps: Group stage only; heavy processing required; incomplete coverage; 34 MB

title: Football — FIFA WC 1930–2026 (piterfm)
key_columns: date, teams, score, xG (from ~2010), captains, named goalscorers, cards, subs, stadium, attendance
traps: xG only reliable from ~2010; CC-BY-NC-SA (no commercial use)

title: International Football Results 1872–2026 (martj42)
key_columns: results: date, home_team, away_team, home_score, away_score, tournament, city, country, neutral; goalscorers: scorer, minute, own_goal, penalty; shootouts: winner, first_shooter
traps: WC rows: 1058 matches, ~2973 goalscorer rows. Tournament field = 'FIFA World Cup' to filter. No lineup/xG data. HIGHEST VOTE COUNT of any WC dataset on Kaggle (2639). NEW in round 2.

title: World Cup Database 1930–2022 (joshfjelstul)
key_tables: matches(900×37), goals(2548×27), players(7907×12+birth_date), player_appearances(18623×22), squads(10142×12), bookings(2466×26), substitutions(6464×24), penalty_kicks(279×19), managers(357×6), referees(380×9), stadiums(185×8), award_winners(132×12), host_countries(22×7), tournaments(21×18)
key_columns: birth_date for 7907 players; position (GK/DEF/MID/FWD); captain flag; minute_regulation+minute_stoppage for goals/bookings/subs; penalty_kick outcome; Wikipedia links; award winners (Golden Boot, Ball, Glove)
traps: Covers through Qatar 2022 only (no 2026). Most complete relational WC DB; best for manager/referee/award analysis. CC-BY-SA. NEW in round 2.

title: Ultimate FIFA WC Dataset 1930–2026 (nawfeelrahman)
key_columns: appearances, wins, losses, draws, goals_for, goals_against, best_finish, H2H record between 61 WC rivalry pairs
traps: Head-to-head only covers 61 pairs that actually met at WC; not all rivalries. Team-edition aggregates useful for cross-tournament comparisons.

title: FIFA WC Goalscorers Career Totals 1930–2018
key_columns: player_name, country, goals, tournaments, year_range; top scorer = Klose (Germany) 16 goals
traps: Through 2018 only (missing 2022+2026). Use martj42/goalscorers for more complete named goal data.

title: WC 2026 Historical Elo Ratings (afonsocruz)
key_columns: year, snapshot_date, country, rank, rating, rank_max, rating_max, rank_avg, rating_avg, matches_total, wins, losses, draws, goals_for, goals_against, confederation, is_host
traps: Only 48 WC-2026 teams; pre-tournament snapshot (not updated with results); Elo from club football analogue not official FIFA ELO. NEW in round 2.

title: FIFA WC Player z-Score Comparisons (joebeachcapital)
key_columns: player, season, team, z-scores: goals_z, xg_z, crosses_z, boxtouches_z, passes_z, progpasses_z, takeons_z, progruns_z, tackles_z, interceptions_z, clearances_z, blocks_z, aerials_z, fouls_z, fouled_z, nsxg_z
traps: z-scores normalized within each tournament edition; not raw stats. Best for cross-edition player ranking, not absolute metrics. NEW in round 2.

title: FIFA WC 2022 — Tactical Match Stats (die9origephit)
key_columns: line_breaks attempted/completed, offers_to_receive (in-behind/between/in-front), channel attacks (left/central/right), defensive_pressures_applied, possession_in_contest, goal_preventions
traps: 2022 Qatar WC only; 88-column wide-format (both teams as columns). Unique tactical metrics from FIFA data portal not available in other datasets. NEW in round 2.

title: FIFA WC 2026 Complete Tournament Stats (velvetcrystal)
key_columns: matches: xG, weather, attendance, FIFA_rank; players: per-match rating, minutes_played, tackles, interceptions, saves
traps: Last updated 2026-06-20; missing recent knockout-stage matches. Player ratings appear synthetic (uniform distribution). Prefer mominullptr+swaptr for current data. NEW in round 2.

title: FIFA WC 2026 Player Performance (SYNTHETIC — DO NOT USE)
key_columns: distance_covered_km, sprint_distance_km, top_speed_kmh, stamina_score, creativity_score (all synthetic)
traps: ⚠️ SYNTHETIC DATA: 1050 unique match_ids impossible (only 104 WC2026 games); dates extend to 2026-07-31 (future); player names are composites (e.g. 'Rodri Fati', 'Ansu Le Normand'); GPS/biometric metrics not available publicly. HIGH DOWNLOAD COUNT but FABRICATED. Do not use for any factual analysis.
